---
title: "Air Connectivity Study"
type: "Technical report"
date: '2025-12-15'
excerpt: "Performance Study"
bibliography: [../../../static/bib/aviation.bib]
link-citations: true
dwnld_i: <i class="fa pru fa-download"></i>
tags: connectivity, air transport, 
---
```{r echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# run setup script
source(here::here("_common.R"))
```
<div class="container">
<div class="row align-items-start">
<div class="col-sm-2">
<div class="card border-0"><a href="/library/2025_12_18_Air_Connectivity_Final_technical_report.pdf">
  <img class="card-img-top" src="/images/tn_connex.png" alt="Air Connectivity Study">
  <div class="card-body"><h5 class="card-title">Connectivity Study</h5></a><p class="card-text"></p>
</div></div>
</div>
<div class="col-sm-10">

This technical report was commissioned by a group of eight EUROCONTROL Member States seeking to better understand the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic and Russia’s war against Ukraine on air connectivity.

One of the central insights of this study is that air connectivity has not simply “recovered” in line with traffic volume. Instead, the structure, composition, and frequency of connections have subtly changed in a post-COVID world. Some previously served routes have disappeared entirely; others are now operated with reduced frequency or by different air transport operators. This clearly shows that air connectivity is a predominantly economic viability consideration of services providers (aircraft operators) in a liberalised
market.

Complementary to the technical report, our [connectivity dashboard](/traffic/connectivity/) provides an overview of direct connections between airports in the EUROCONTROL area. 

</div>
</div></div>

Read more in the full document available for download below. <br>

<a href="/library/2025_12_18_Air_Connectivity_Final_technical_report.pdf" class="btn btn-secondary" role="button" target="_blank"> Air Connectivity Study <br> {{% dwnld_i %}} Download </a>

[apoc]: /library/2025_12_18_Air_Connectivity_Final_technical_report "Air Connectivity Study"
